summary: Created a 28-threat STRIDE + MITRE ATT&CK + NIST 800-53 threat model for the FedSecure GovCloud platform, covering all six STRIDE categories across 35 architecture components. All threats include component-specific descriptions, real MITRE technique IDs, NIST 800-53 control mappings, CVE references, cui_impact, fips_relevant flags, and POA&M eligibility.
key_threats: TM-GOV-001: CAC/PIV bypass via X.509 null-byte injection (CVE-2024-0057) — CRITICAL
TM-GOV-003: AES-ECB non-FIPS cipher in Vault transit engine — CRITICAL FIPS violation
TM-GOV-004: Leaky Vessels container escape via runc (CVE-2024-21626) — CRITICAL
TM-GOV-025: nf_tables kernel privilege escalation (CVE-2024-1086, CISA KEV) — CRITICAL
TM-GOV-005: Missing Istio default-deny AuthorizationPolicy — lateral movement HIGH
TM-GOV-007: Supply chain attack via Harbor air-gap sneakernet — HIGH
TM-GOV-012: DNS tunneling air-gap bypass for CUI exfiltration — MEDIUM
TM-GOV-019: Kyverno fail-open misconfiguration during outage — HIGH
